subject: docs(patterns): add cross-references between all implementation docs
body:
7 of 8 pattern docs now have "Related patterns" sections linking to
each other (HTTPS_PROXY has no natural UI relationships). Previously
only BURGER_MENU and THEME_DARK_MODE had any cross-references.

Key relationships documented:
- DEBUG_SYSTEM ↔ PWA_SYSTEM (diagnostics tab)
- DEBUG_SYSTEM ↔ BURGER_MENU (error routing, z-index scale)
- DEBUG_SYSTEM ↔ THEME_DARK_MODE (separate root, .dark class)
- PWA_SYSTEM ↔ APP_ICONS (manifest icons)
- PWA_SYSTEM ↔ BURGER_MENU (install/update menu items)
- DOWNLOAD_PDF ↔ BURGER_MENU (no-print class)
- DOWNLOAD_PDF ↔ THEME_DARK_MODE (print override)
- EVENT_BUS → DEBUG_SYSTEM (error reporting dependency)

Tags: documentation, patterns, cross-references
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-alignment
Semver: patch
